description:
Create a new entry (title + optional HTML content) in a LabArchives notebook. DESTRUCTIVE: it writes to the live electronic lab notebook. Plain-text content is wrapped in

...

by the core.
rules: DESTRUCTIVE — adds an entry to the live remote notebook
credentials are read from LA_CONFIG (a config.yaml)
LA_NBID selects the notebook; LA_TITLE is required; LA_CONTENT is optional
needs the labarchives-py package + network; degrades to {} offline
usage: Set LA_CONFIG, LA_NBID, LA_TITLE; optionally LA_CONTENT. Output: create_entry.json audit (records the new entry id when the API returns one).
limitation: Requires the labarchives-py package, valid credentials, and network. Mutates the remote ELN, so the executor gates it (destructive). Offline the tool writes {} and exits 0.
